description: Set up apps/quantdocs workspace with package.json, tsconfig files, vitest config, app.ts entry point, and all backend services (doc, yjs-server, presence, comment, export, template) plus routes (docs, ai). Add 'quantdocs' to QuantApp type in packages/common/src/types.ts.
steps: Create apps/quantdocs/package.json following apps/quantmail/package.json pattern. Name: @quant/quantdocs, deps: @quant/auth, @quant/ai, @quant/common, @quant/database, @quant/realtime, @quant/server-core, @quant/shared-ui, fastify, ioredis, zod, yjs, y-protocols (for Yjs collab), uuid. Scripts: test: vitest run, typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.backend.json
Create apps/quantdocs/tsconfig.json and apps/quantdocs/tsconfig.backend.json following quantmail pattern with paths to workspace packages
Create apps/quantdocs/vitest.config.ts following quantmail pattern: globals true, environment node, include backend/__tests__/**/*.test.ts
Add 'quantdocs' to the QuantApp type union in packages/common/src/types.ts

Create apps/quantdocs/backend/services/doc.service.ts - DocService class with constructor(prisma). Methods: createDoc(input: CreateDocInput), getDoc(docId, userId), updateDoc(docId, userId, content, title), deleteDoc(docId, userId), listDocs(userId, pagination), getVersionHistory(docId, userId), restoreVersion(docId, userId, versionId). Store versions on update. Use createAppError for auth/not-found errors.

Create apps/quantdocs/backend/services/yjs-server.ts - YjsServer class managing Yjs doc instances in memory. Methods: getOrCreateDoc(docId), applyUpdate(docId, update: Uint8Array), getStateVector(docId), encodeState(docId), handleConnection(docId, clientId). Use yjs library's Y.Doc, Y.applyUpdate, Y.encodeStateAsUpdate, Y.encodeStateVector.

Create apps/quantdocs/backend/services/presence.service.ts - PresenceService class. Methods: setCursor(docId, userId, position: CursorPosition), removeCursor(docId, userId), getCursors(docId). CursorPosition interface: { line, column, selection?: {start, end} }. Store in a Map<docId, Map<userId, CursorInfo>>.

Create apps/quantdocs/backend/services/comment.service.ts - CommentService class with constructor(prisma). Methods: createComment(docId, userId, content, selection), replyToComment(commentId, userId, content), resolveComment(commentId, userId), getComments(docId), createSuggestion(docId, userId, originalText, suggestedText, selection). Use createAppError for errors.

Create apps/quantdocs/backend/services/export.service.ts - ExportService class. Methods: exportToMarkdown(doc), exportToHtml(doc), exportToPdf(doc) (return Buffer), exportToDocx(doc) (return Buffer), exportToLatex(doc). Doc interface: { title, content (HTML or structured blocks), metadata }. For PDF/DOCX, generate minimal valid binary format representations.

Create apps/quantdocs/backend/services/template.service.ts - TemplateService class. Methods: getTemplates(), getTemplate(templateId), createFromTemplate(templateId, userId, customizations). Provide built-in templates: blank, meeting-notes, project-proposal, technical-spec, report.

Create apps/quantdocs/backend/routes/docs.ts - Fastify plugin with routes: POST /docs (create), GET /docs (list), GET /docs/:id (get), PUT /docs/:id (update), DELETE /docs/:id (delete), GET /docs/:id/versions (version history), POST /docs/:id/restore (restore version), GET /docs/:id/comments (list comments), POST /docs/:id/comments (create comment), POST /comments/:id/reply (reply), POST /comments/:id/resolve (resolve), POST /docs/:id/export (export with format query param), GET /templates (list), POST /templates/:id/create (create from template). Use zod validation for all request bodies.

Create apps/quantdocs/backend/routes/ai.ts - Fastify plugin with routes: POST /ai/write-from-outline, POST /ai/expand-section, POST /ai/simplify, POST /ai/translate, POST /ai/grammar-check, POST /ai/table-from-text, POST /ai/diagram-from-text. Each validates input with zod and delegates to the respective AI service.
Create apps/quantdocs/backend/app.ts - buildApp function following quantmail pattern. Register docs routes at /api/v1/docs prefix and ai routes at /api/v1/ai prefix.
acceptance_criteria: apps/quantdocs/package.json exists with correct name and workspace dependencies
TypeScript compiles without errors: tsc --noEmit -p apps/quantdocs/tsconfig.backend.json
All 10 service files exist with properly typed classes and exported interfaces
Both route files exist with zod validation and proper endpoint definitions
app.ts correctly registers routes and exports buildApp
verification: Run: NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run from workspace root targeting quantdocs tests (after FEAT-002 adds tests)
findings: Used local PrismaClient interface definitions instead of importing from @prisma/client (which is not available as a generated type in this workspace, same pre-existing issue as quantchat). TypeScript compiles cleanly. Also had to add quantdocs entry to QUANT_APPS constant in packages/common/src/constants.ts to satisfy Record<QuantApp, ...> type constraint. NODE_OPTIONS must be cleared for all node/pnpm commands.
